column1: Black Myth: Wukong is an action RPG inspired by Journey to the West, known for high-quality visuals and challenging combat.
Killing God: Hu Sun is an action RPG inspired by Journey to the West, featuring staff combat, transformations, and mythical bosses.
This action RPG combines Chinese mythological creatures, close-range combat, and a cinematic adventure structure.
Bloodborne is an action RPG set in a Victorian Gothic horror world, known for fast combat and a strange atmosphere.
Dark Souls III is a dark fantasy action RPG known for high difficulty, careful level design, and deep worldbuilding.
Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice is a challenging action-adventure game set in a reimagined Sengoku-era Japan, focusing on precise sword combat and stealth.
Elden Ring is an open-world action RPG by FromSoftware and George R. R. Martin, known for its vast world and flexible character builds.
The player explores a wide open world in Elden Ring, filled with secrets, dangerous enemies, and hidden treasure.
